generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
}

// ── Multi-tenant root (cloud: Postgres + RLS; local dev: SQLite) ─────────────

model Organization {
  id        String    @id @default(cuid())
  /// URL-safe tenant key (login, subdomains, worker routing)
  slug      String    @unique
  name      String
  /// Soft-delete grace window (hard-delete after policy window)
  deletedAt DateTime?
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt

  founders             Founder[]
  sessions             Session[]
  uploads              Upload[]
  conclusions          Conclusion[]
  contradictions       Contradiction[]
  driftEvents          DriftEvent[]
  researchSuggestions  ResearchSuggestion[]
  reviewItems          ReviewItem[]
  openQuestions        OpenQuestion[]
  auditEvents          AuditEvent[]
  publicationReviews   PublicationReview[]
  publishedConclusions PublishedConclusion[]
  publicResponses      PublicResponse[]
}

// ── Founders (portal users) — maps to FounderProfile in noosphere/models.py ─

model Founder {
  id             String       @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String
  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  name         String
  username     String
  email        String
  passwordHash String
  role         String @default("founder") // founder | admin
  bio          String?
  avatar       String?

  /// Maps to FounderProfile.id in Noosphere
  noosphereId String?

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  sessions              Session[]
  uploads               Upload[]
  auditEvents           AuditEvent[]
  attributedConclusions Conclusion[] @relation("ConclusionFounder")
  researchSuggestions   ResearchSuggestion[]
  reviewResolutions     ReviewItem[] @relation("ReviewResolver")
  publicationReviews  PublicationReview[] @relation("PublicationReviewer")

  @@unique([organizationId, email])
  @@unique([organizationId, username])
  @@index([organizationId])
}

/// Browser session (server-side row; cookie carries signed opaque token)
model Session {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String
  founderId      String
  token          String @unique
  expiresAt      DateTime
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())

  founder      Founder      @relation(fields: [founderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([founderId])
}

// ── Uploads ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

model Upload {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String
  founderId      String

  title            String
  description      String?
  sourceType       String @default("written") // written | annotation | external | transcript
  originalName     String
  mimeType         String
  filePath         String
  fileSize         Int
  textContent      String?
  status           String @default("pending") // pending | processing | ingested | failed
  processLog       String @default("") // streamed CLI stdout/stderr
  claimsCount      Int?
  methodCount      Int?
  substCount       Int?
  principleCount   Int?
  errorMessage     String?
  createdAt        DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime @updatedAt

  founder      Founder      @relation(fields: [founderId], references: [id])
  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  auditEvents  AuditEvent[]

  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([founderId])
}

// ── Conclusion — mirrors noosphere.models.Conclusion ───────────────────────

model Conclusion {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String

  /// Stable id if synced from / produced for Noosphere
  noosphereId String? @unique
  text        String
  confidenceTier String // firm | founder | open (ConfidenceTier)
  rationale      String @default("")
  supportingPrincipleIds String @default("[]") // JSON string[]
  evidenceChainClaimIds   String @default("[]")
  dissentClaimIds         String @default("[]")
  confidence              Float  @default(0)
  topicHint               String @default("") // UI filter / display
  createdAt               DateTime @default(now())

  attributedFounderId String?
  attributedFounder   Founder? @relation("ConclusionFounder", fields: [attributedFounderId], references: [id])
  organization        Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  publicationReviews  PublicationReview[]

  @@index([organizationId])
}

// ── Publication (SP10) — review queue + versioned public snapshots ───────────

/// Internal gate before a conclusion may appear on the public site.
model PublicationReview {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String
  conclusionId   String

  /// queued | in_review | needs_revision | declined | published
  status           String @default("queued")
  /// JSON: { metaAnalysisOk, adversarialEngagedOk, clarityOk, noLeakageOk }
  checklistJson    String @default("{}")
  reviewerNotes    String @default("")
  declineReason    String @default("")
  revisionAsk      String @default("")

  reviewerFounderId String?
  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime @updatedAt

  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  target         Conclusion   @relation(fields: [conclusionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  reviewer       Founder?     @relation("PublicationReviewer", fields: [reviewerFounderId], references: [id])

  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([conclusionId])
  @@index([status])
}

/// Immutable-ish public snapshot (new row per material revision).
model PublishedConclusion {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String
  sourceConclusionId String

  slug    String
  version Int @default(1)

  /// Headline discounted confidence (SP05); stated founder/model confidence alongside in JSON.
  discountedConfidence Float
  statedConfidence     Float @default(0)
  calibrationDiscountReason String @default("")

  /// Full page payload: evidence, exit conditions, adversarial, voice map, timeline, citations.
  payloadJson String @default("{}")

  /// Zenodo DOI for this revision (minted on first publish of revision).
  doi            String @default("")
  zenodoRecordId String @default("")

  publishedAt DateTime @default(now())

  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  responses    PublicResponse[]

  @@unique([slug, version])
  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([slug])
}

/// Structured reader responses — moderation queue (SP10).
model PublicResponse {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String

  publishedConclusionId String

  /// counter_evidence | counter_argument | clarification | agreement_extension
  kind    String
  body    String
  citationUrl String @default("")
  submitterEmail String @default("")
  orcid          String @default("")
  pseudonymous   Boolean @default(false)

  /// pending | approved | rejected | engaged
  status       String @default("pending")
  moderatorNote String @default("")

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  published    PublishedConclusion @relation(fields: [publishedConclusionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([publishedConclusionId])
  @@index([status])
}

// ── ContradictionFinding + scores — mirrors pipeline outputs ────────────────

model Contradiction {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String

  claimAId     String
  claimBId     String
  severity     Float
  sixLayerJson String?
  narrative    String   @default("")
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  @@index([organizationId])
}

// ── DriftEvent — mirrors noosphere.models.DriftEvent ───────────────────────

model DriftEvent {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String

  noosphereId String? @unique
  targetId    String
  targetKind  String  @default("principle")
  episodeId   String  @default("")
  observedAt  DateTime
  driftScore  Float   @default(0)
  notes       String  @default("")
  claimSequenceIdsJson        String @default("[]")
  naturalLanguageSummary      String @default("")
  earliestInconsistentClaimId String @default("")
  authorTopicKey              String @default("")
  topicId                     String @default("")

  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  @@index([organizationId])
}

// ── ResearchSuggestion — mirrors noosphere.models.ResearchSuggestion ───────

model ResearchSuggestion {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String

  noosphereId  String? @unique
  title        String
  summary      String  @default("")
  rationale    String  @default("")
  readingUris  String  @default("[]") // JSON string[]
  sessionLabel String  @default("")
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  suggestedForFounderId String?
  suggestedForFounder   Founder? @relation(fields: [suggestedForFounderId], references: [id])
  organization          Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  @@index([organizationId])
}

// ── ReviewItem — mirrors noosphere.models.ReviewItem (+ portal resolution) ─

model ReviewItem {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String

  noosphereId String? @unique
  claimAId    String
  claimBId    String
  reason      String  @default("")
  layerVerdictsJson String @default("{}") // dict str -> str
  severity    Float   @default(0)
  status      String  @default("open") // open | done | dismissed
  aggregatorVerdict String?
  priorScoresJson     String?
  humanVerdict        String?
  humanOverrule       Boolean @default(false)
  resolutionNote      String  @default("")
  createdAt           DateTime @default(now())
  resolvedAt          DateTime?

  resolvedByFounderId String?
  resolvedByFounder   Founder? @relation("ReviewResolver", fields: [resolvedByFounderId], references: [id])
  organization        Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  @@index([organizationId])
}

// ── OpenQuestionCandidate — mirrors conclusions.OpenQuestionCandidate ───────

model OpenQuestion {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String

  noosphereId              String? @unique
  summary                  String
  claimAId                 String
  claimBId                 String
  unresolvedReason         String  @default("")
  layerDisagreementSummary String  @default("")
  createdAt                DateTime @default(now())

  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  @@index([organizationId])
}

model AuditEvent {
  id             String @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId String
  founderId      String
  uploadId       String?
  action         String
  detail         String?
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())

  founder      Founder      @relation(fields: [founderId], references: [id])
  organization Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  upload       Upload?      @relation(fields: [uploadId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  @@index([organizationId])
}

# Founder Portal — Next.js standalone (multi-stage)
FROM node:22-bookworm AS deps
WORKDIR /app
COPY founder-portal/package.json founder-portal/package-lock.json* ./
RUN npm ci --legacy-peer-deps

FROM node:22-bookworm AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY founder-portal/ ./
RUN mkdir -p public
ENV NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1
RUN npx prisma generate && npm run build

FROM node:22-bookworm-slim AS runner
WORKDIR /app
ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1
RUN addgroup --system --gid 1001 nodejs && adduser --system --uid 1001 nextjs
COPY --from=builder /app/public ./public
COPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/.next/standalone ./
COPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/.next/static ./.next/static
USER nextjs
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["node", "server.js"]

# Founder Portal — Next.js standalone server with SQLite (multi-stage)
#
# DB initialization strategy: this schema has no `prisma/migrations` directory,
# so `prisma migrate deploy` is not applicable. Instead, the builder stage runs
# `prisma db push` against /tmp/seed.db to materialize the schema, then the
# runner copies that file to /app/seed.db. The entrypoint seeds the volume on
# first boot. This keeps the runtime image free of the Prisma CLI.

# ── Stage 1: install dependencies (incl. devDeps for build) ──────────────────
FROM node:20-alpine AS deps
WORKDIR /app
# Build tools for native modules (better-sqlite3)
RUN apk add --no-cache python3 make g++ libc6-compat
COPY package.json package-lock.json ./
RUN npm ci --legacy-peer-deps

# ── Stage 2: build Next.js + generate Prisma client + seed DB ────────────────
FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app
RUN apk add --no-cache python3 make g++ libc6-compat
COPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY . .
ENV NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1
RUN npx prisma generate
RUN npm run build
# Materialize a blank schema-applied SQLite DB used as the first-boot seed.
RUN DATABASE_URL="file:/tmp/seed.db" npx prisma db push --skip-generate --accept-data-loss

# ── Stage 3: production runner ───────────────────────────────────────────────
FROM node:20-alpine AS runner
WORKDIR /app
ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1
RUN apk add --no-cache libc6-compat \
    && addgroup --system --gid 1001 nodejs \
    && adduser --system --uid 1001 nextjs

COPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/.next/standalone ./
COPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/.next/static ./.next/static
COPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/public ./public
COPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/prisma ./prisma
COPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/node_modules/.prisma ./node_modules/.prisma
COPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/node_modules/@prisma ./node_modules/@prisma
COPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /tmp/seed.db /app/seed.db
COPY --chown=nextjs:nodejs scripts/docker-entrypoint.sh /app/docker-entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /app/docker-entrypoint.sh

# SQLite database lives on a named volume so it survives container restarts.
RUN mkdir -p /app/data && chown nextjs:nodejs /app/data
VOLUME ["/app/data"]

USER nextjs
EXPOSE 3000
ENV PORT=3000
ENV HOSTNAME="0.0.0.0"
ENV DATABASE_URL="file:/app/data/founder-portal.db"

ENTRYPOINT ["/app/docker-entrypoint.sh"]
CMD ["node", "server.js"]

set -e

# On first boot, seed the SQLite database from the schema-applied template
# baked into the image. Subsequent boots leave the volume's DB untouched.

  cp /app/seed.db /app/data/founder-portal.db
fi

exec "$@"

Docker is unavailable in this environment, so I validated by review per the fallback instruction. Files all follow multi-stage conventions, the heredoc nginx config requires BuildKit (default in modern Docker), and the founder-portal entrypoint handles first-boot seeding without needing the Prisma CLI at runtime.

## Summary

**Files created (8):**
- `founder-portal/Dockerfile` — 3-stage build (deps → builder → runner) on `node:20-alpine`. Builder runs `prisma generate`, `npm run build`, then `prisma db push` against `/tmp/seed.db` to materialize a schema-applied SQLite seed. Runner copies standalone output, `.next/static`, `public`, `prisma/`, generated Prisma client (`.prisma` + `@prisma`), seed DB, and entrypoint. SQLite volume at `/app/data`. Runs as non-root `nextjs`.
- `founder-portal/scripts/docker-entrypoint.sh` — copies seed DB to volume on first boot only, then `exec`s.
- `founder-portal/.dockerignore`
- `theseus-public/Dockerfile` — 2-stage: build static export, then nginx with inline conf via heredoc (try_files, gzip, 404 page).
- `theseus-public/.dockerignore`
- `theseus-public/vercel.json` — Next.js framework, `out` output, security headers.
- `theseus-public/netlify.toml` — same publish/headers, 404 redirect.
- `docker-compose.yml` (repo root) — `services:` v2 format, founder-portal on :3000 with named `portal-data` volume, theseus-public on :8080.

**Notable choices:**
- Prisma DB init via "seed DB" approach (Approach B). Reason: `prisma/migrations/` doesn't exist (Prisma 7 with `prisma.config.ts`), so `prisma migrate deploy` would no-op. `prisma db push` in builder produces a schema-applied DB; runtime image carries no Prisma CLI.
- Added `--legacy-peer-deps` (matches existing `deploy/docker/founder-portal/Dockerfile` convention) and `python3 make g++ libc6-compat` for `better-sqlite3` native build on Alpine.
- Did not touch the existing `deploy/docker/founder-portal/Dockerfile` — it builds from a different context (repo root) and is out of scope.
- Compose service names: `founder-portal` and `theseus-public` (host port 8080 → container 80 for the static site to avoid clashing with portal's 3000).

**Blockers:**
- Docker CLI not installed on this machine — could not run `docker build` or `docker compose config`. Files were syntax-validated by review only. Recommend running the verification commands from step 9 on a Docker-equipped machine before relying on the images.
